creator: yamagi@yamagi.org
text:
I just hit the same problem after having upgraded one of my Samba servers to FreeBSD 10.0-RELEASE. Port versions are:
- nss-pam-ldapd-0.8.14_2
- openldap-client-2.4.39_1
- samba36-3.6.24_2

As in the other comments, getent(1) and ldapsearch(1) are working fine. Nevertheless Samba is unable to connect to the OpenLDAP server due to some strange TLS problems. As an educated guess I would suspect an OpenSSL version problem. The OpenLDAP server is still running on FreeBSD 8.4-RELEASE with OpenSSL 0.9.8y, while FreeBSD 10.0 has 1.0.1e-freebsd. Sadly I won't be able to upgrade the OpenLDAP server and verify my guess in the next few weeks.
